resources.string: 跑马灯的实现关键代码： android:singleLine="true" android:ellipsize="marquee" android:focusable="true" android:focusableInTouchMode="true" android:marqueeRepeatLimit="marquee_forever" 然后还得在java代码中选中控件，例如： mtv1.setSelected(true);
Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.Made by hzx.
